metadata.title: Salesforce Platform Component Definition
metadata.remarks: OSCAL component definition for Salesforce CRM/Platform deployments. Specifies collection methods, evidence queries, and pass/fail criteria for each SSCF v1.0 control applicable to Salesforce. Used by sfdc_connect.py as a catalog-driven evidence specification. Collection methods: SOQL (REST API), Tooling API, Metadata API, SecurityHealthCheck API, manual questionnaire.

components.title: Salesforce CRM Platform
components.description: Salesforce Sales Cloud, Service Cloud, or Platform (Lightning) SaaS deployment assessed against the SBS v1.0 security control baseline.
components.purpose: CRM, case management, and business process automation SaaS platform.

control-implementations.description: Salesforce control implementation evidence specifications for SBS v1.0.

implemented-requirements.description: MFA enforcement verified via Salesforce Security Health Check and Profile/Permission Set API.

props.name: pass-criteria
props.value: EnableMfaDirectUi=true OR MFA enforced via IdP SSO

props.name: fail-criteria
props.value: EnableMfaDirectUi=false AND local login enabled for non-break-glass accounts

implemented-requirements.description: Privileged role assignments verified via Profile, PermissionSet, and SetupAuditTrail SOQL.

props.name: pass-criteria
props.value: All admin profiles have documented approvals; PermissionSet assignments reviewed < 12 months

props.name: fail-criteria
props.value: Active System Administrator profiles without documented recertification

implemented-requirements.description: SSO configuration verified via Salesforce SSO Settings and SAML Metadata API.

props.name: fail-criteria
props.value: SSO not enabled OR local password login enabled for non-System profiles

implemented-requirements.description: User lifecycle assessed via inactive user detection and last-login analysis.

props.name: pass-criteria
props.value: No active users with LastLoginDate > 90 days ago without documented exception

props.name: fail-criteria
props.value: Active accounts with LastLoginDate > 90 days (stale) or terminated users still active

implemented-requirements.description: Service account governance assessed via Connected App and integration user audit.

props.name: pass-criteria
props.value: All Connected Apps have named owners; no unnamed or orphaned integration users

props.name: fail-criteria
props.value: Connected Apps without active owners or with excessive scope

implemented-requirements.description: Session timeout verified via Salesforce Security Settings (session timeout value).

props.name: fail-criteria
props.value: SessionSettings.sessionTimeout > 8 hours OR sessionTimeout not configured

implemented-requirements.description: JIT access via Salesforce Delegated Administration or Permission Set Groups with time-limited grants.

props.name: pass-criteria
props.value: Documented JIT process exists with approval workflow and automatic expiry

props.name: fail-criteria
props.value: No JIT process; standing admin accounts used for all elevated access

implemented-requirements.description: External/guest access controls assessed via Experience Cloud and guest user profile settings.

props.name: pass-criteria
props.value: Guest users have time-bound licenses; no Guest users with admin permissions

props.name: fail-criteria
props.value: Guest users with Create/Edit/Delete data permissions or no expiry date

implemented-requirements.description: Security baseline assessed via Salesforce Security Health Check API.

props.name: fail-criteria
props.value: Score < 70 OR any Critical-severity Health Check risk present

implemented-requirements.description: Drift detection assessed via SetupAuditTrail for recent configuration changes.

props.name: pass-criteria
props.value: Security-relevant config changes have corresponding change tickets; no unauthorized changes detected

props.name: fail-criteria
props.value: Security config changes without documented approval in trailing 90 days

implemented-requirements.description: API credential lifecycle assessed via Connected App and Named Credential review.

props.name: pass-criteria
props.value: All Connected Apps use JWT or OAuth 2.0; no long-lived passwords in Named Credentials > 90 days

props.name: fail-criteria
props.value: Username/password credentials in Named Credentials exceeding 90-day rotation limit

implemented-requirements.description: Sensitive data access assessed via field-level security and profile object permissions.

props.name: pass-criteria
props.value: PII fields restricted to documented roles; field-level encryption enabled where supported

props.name: fail-criteria
props.value: PII fields readable by standard user profiles without documented business need

implemented-requirements.description: Data export controls assessed via report export permissions and data loader access.

props.name: pass-criteria
props.value: ExportReport permission restricted to documented roles; bulk API access limited to integration users

props.name: fail-criteria
props.value: ExportReport or ViewAllData permissions granted to non-documented user classes

implemented-requirements.description: Security telemetry assessed via EventLogFile availability and SIEM integration status.

props.name: pass-criteria
props.value: EventLogFile enabled for Login, API, ReportExport, SetupAuditTrail event types; SIEM integration active

props.name: fail-criteria
props.value: EventMonitoring not enabled OR critical event types missing OR no SIEM integration

implemented-requirements.description: Admin audit logging assessed via SetupAuditTrail completeness and alert configuration.

props.name: pass-criteria
props.value: SetupAuditTrail captures all security-relevant admin actions; SIEM alerts configured for high-risk changes

props.name: fail-criteria
props.value: No SIEM alerts on MFA changes, profile changes, or security setting modifications

implemented-requirements.description: Audit retention verified via EventLogFile retention settings and SIEM retention policy.

props.name: pass-criteria
props.value: Salesforce EventLogFile retention >= 30 days (Shield); SIEM hot retention >= 12 months; cold >= 36 months

props.name: fail-criteria
props.value: EventLogFile default 1-day retention without SIEM forwarding; retention below regulatory minimum

implemented-requirements.description: Threat policy enforcement assessed via Transaction Security policies and login restrictions.

props.name: pass-criteria
props.value: Transaction Security policies active for bulk export, impossible travel, unmanaged device access

props.name: fail-criteria
props.value: No Transaction Security policies configured OR policies in Warn-only mode without SOC routing

implemented-requirements.description: Alert triage verified via SIEM alert routing documentation and SOC SLA evidence.

props.name: pass-criteria
props.value: Documented SOC runbook for Salesforce alerts; MTTA for critical alerts <= 15 minutes

props.name: fail-criteria
props.value: No documented alert SLA or Salesforce alerts not routed to SOC queue
